# Streamline Dumpsters Ltd.

> Locally owned dumpster rental and junk removal company serving Central Ohio. Transparent flat-rate pricing, same-day delivery, no hidden fees. Fully insured (Progressive Commercial) and DOT certified. Based in Dublin, Ohio.

## Services

- **10-Yard Dumpster Rental** *(Coming Soon)* — Compact option for smaller projects. Dimensions: 12ft long x 8ft wide x 4ft tall (equivalent to 3–4 pickup truck loads). 4,000 lb weight allowance. Best for single-room cleanouts, small bathroom remodels, garage decluttering, fence/deck removal, and landscaping debris.
- **14-Yard Dumpster Rental** *(Available Now)* — $319 flat rate + 8% Ohio sales tax = $344.52 total. Includes delivery, 3-day rental period, 4,000 lb weight allowance, pickup, and driveway protection boards. Additional days: $15/day (no maximum rental duration). Weight overage: $75/ton beyond 4,000 lbs. Same-day delivery available when booked before 2 PM. Dimensions: 14ft long x 8ft wide x 4ft tall (equivalent to 4–5 pickup truck loads). Most popular size.
- **20-Yard Dumpster Rental** *(Coming Soon)* — Large-capacity option for major projects. Dimensions: 14ft long x 8ft wide x 6ft tall (equivalent to 6–8 pickup truck loads). 4,000 lb weight allowance. Best for large home renovations, whole-house cleanouts, roofing projects over 2,000 sq ft, commercial construction debris, and multi-room remodels.
- **Live Load Dumpster Service** — $279 flat rate + 8% Ohio sales tax = $301.32 total. Truck stays on-site while the customer loads; dumpster is hauled away the same visit. 1-hour loading window. Same 14-yard dumpster, same 4,000 lb weight allowance and prohibited items list as the standard rental. Best for post-renovation debris removal, quick cleanouts where everything is pre-staged, or properties without a good long-term placement option. Must be booked by phone. Everything must be sorted and ready to load before the truck arrives.
- **Junk Removal** — Full-service, crew-loaded pickup. We go inside the home, carry items out, and haul everything away. Customer does no lifting. Pricing by volume; text photos to (614) 636-2343 for an instant quote.

## Booking & Payment

- Online booking available 24/7 at https://sl-dumpsters.com/bookNow.html
- Payment by credit or debit card (Square)
- Customer does not need to be present for delivery or pickup
- Same-day delivery requires booking before 2 PM
- To request pickup: call or text (614) 636-2343 when ready; early pickup is always free

## Delivery & Pickup Process

1. Customer books online or calls
2. Dumpster is delivered to the specified address (customer receives advance call from driver)
3. Protection boards are placed under the dumpster automatically to prevent driveway damage
4. Customer fills the dumpster at their own pace
5. Customer calls or texts when ready for pickup (or on the last day of the rental period)
6. Dumpster is picked up; overage weight fees (if any) are calculated at the disposal facility

## Accepted Materials

Household junk, furniture (couches, dressers, tables, bed frames), mattresses, appliances (washers, dryers, refrigerators, stoves, water heaters), construction and demolition debris (drywall, lumber, flooring, tile, cabinets, countertops), roofing shingles, yard waste (branches, brush, sod, fencing), old electronics, carpet and padding, general cleanout materials.

## Prohibited Materials

Liquid paint (dried/solid paint is acceptable), paint solvents and thinners, motor oil and automotive fluids, pesticides and herbicides, household chemicals and cleaning solvents, asbestos-containing materials, medical or biohazardous waste, propane tanks and compressed gas cylinders, tires, batteries (automotive and lithium), items containing refrigerants (unless refrigerant has been professionally evacuated).

## Fill Level Rule

Items must be loaded at or below the top rim of the dumpster walls. Debris cannot extend above the walls. Overfilled dumpsters cannot legally be transported on public roads. If a dumpster is overfilled, the customer must remove excess items before pickup can occur.

## Ideal Use Cases

Kitchen and bathroom remodels, garage and basement cleanouts, roofing projects (up to 2,000 sq ft of shingles), deck and fence removal, estate cleanouts, construction debris, yard waste, old furniture, whole-house cleanouts. The 14-yard dumpster is currently available; 10-yard and 20-yard sizes are coming soon.

## Neighbor Sharing

Customers may share a dumpster with a neighbor. The account holder (person who booked) is fully responsible for all contents, total weight, fill level, and any fees. Neighbor-sharing arrangements are between the customers — the account holder vouches for everything that goes in the container.

## Service Area

- Dublin, OH (43016, 43017) — primary market
- Hilliard, OH (43026, 43221)
- Powell, OH (43065)
- Upper Arlington, OH (43220, 43221)
- Worthington, OH (43085, 43235)
- Plain City, OH (43064)
- Columbus, OH (all zip codes)
- Greater Central Ohio

## Contact

- **Phone/Text:** (614) 636-2343
- **Email:** Eli@Sl-Dumpsters.com
- **Location:** Dublin, Ohio
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 7 AM–10 PM | Sat 8 AM–10 PM | Sun 10 AM–4 PM
- **Online Booking:** https://sl-dumpsters.com/bookNow.html (24/7)

## About

Streamline Dumpsters Ltd. is a locally owned and operated business based in Dublin, Ohio. Fully insured through Progressive Commercial and DOT certified. Owner Eli runs the business with a focus on transparent pricing and reliable service. The website features a 24/7 AI chatbot ("Fill-osopher") for instant answers about pricing, scheduling, and dumpster rentals.
